project_title: An Agentic AI Framework for Automating the Software Development Lifecycle

functional_requirements.statement: Students can create a support ticket with a title, description, and category.
acceptance_criteria: Student can submit a ticket with all required fields.
System rejects empty titles or descriptions.

functional_requirements.statement: Students can view a list of their tickets and current status.
acceptance_criteria: Student can see ticket list with status updates.

functional_requirements.statement: Staff users can view all support tickets.
acceptance_criteria: Staff user can access all submitted tickets.

functional_requirements.statement: Staff users can assign tickets to themselves.
acceptance_criteria: Staff user can assign and see assigned tickets.

functional_requirements.statement: Staff users can add internal notes to a ticket.
acceptance_criteria: Staff user can add and view notes on a ticket.

functional_requirements.statement: Staff users can update the status of tickets.
acceptance_criteria: Staff user can change status to In Progress or Resolved.

functional_requirements.statement: Students receive a notification when ticket status changes.
acceptance_criteria: Student is notified of status change.

functional_requirements.statement: Basic authentication is required for all users.
acceptance_criteria: User provides valid credentials to access the system.

non_functional_requirements.statement: Key actions must be logged in the system.
The system should have a user-friendly interface.

assumptions: Students and staff users already have login credentials.
clarification_questions: What specific actions need to be logged?
What platform will notifications be sent through? Email or in-app?

glossary.definition: A support request created by a student.
An alert sent to the user about changes to a ticket.
